title: clientcommands
body:
Adds several useful client-side commands to Minecraft.

These commands include but are not limited to:
- `/ccalc`- evaluates a mathematical expression.
- `/cshrug`, `/cmote` - sends `¯\_(ツ)_/¯` or other emotes in chat.
- `/cfov`, `/cgamma` - change game settings, possible outside their normal range.
- `/cfind`, `/cfindblock`, `/cfinditem` - searches for entities, blocks in the client's render distance, and items in nearby inventories.
- `/cenchant`- [enchantment cracking](https://github.com/Earthcomputer/clientcommands/wiki/cenchant).

For a more complete list of features, see the [community-maintained wiki](https://github.com/Earthcomputer/clientcommands/wiki). If something is missing, feel free to add it.
